nasb.text: Rehoboam appointed Abijah the son of Maacah as head and leader among his brothers, for he intended to make him king.

esv.text: And Rehoboam appointed Abijah the son of Maacah as chief prince among his brothers, for he intended to make him king.

cnv.text: 於是羅波安立了瑪迦的兒子亞比雅作太子，在他的兄弟中為首，因為羅波安想立他繼承王位。

ccb.text: 罗波安就立她所生的儿子亚比雅为太子，以便让他继承王位。
